Container.Name: GymApp
Container.Overview: Gym App - A local-first workout tracker for personal or family use. Features 1300+ exercises with GIFs, custom exercises, workout scheduling, body weight tracking, analytics, Excel export, multi-user support, backup/restore, and PWA install on mobile (add to home screen).

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access the web interface. Open http://your-ip:3001 in your browser.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where the database, uploaded images, and logs are stored. Back this up regularly!

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the default admin account on first run. Change this before starting! Only applies when creating a fresh database.

Config.Name: Server Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal server port. Keep this matching the Web Port above.
